CIPHER.1204.cipherString: Poetry should help, not only to refine the language of the time, but to prevent it from changing too rapidly.
CIPHER.1204.question: A quote by T. S. Eliot has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1204.author: T. S. Eliot

CIPHER.1205.cipherString: In the mountains a night of rain, And above the trees a hundred springs.
CIPHER.1205.question: Frozen inside an ice core sample from Antarctica: this Atbash message by Wang Wei. What does it say?
CIPHER.1205.author: Wang Wei

CIPHER.1206.cipherString: Once you spend three thousand years in the same place, you are pretty much done with it forever.
CIPHER.1206.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Wesley Chu, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1206.author: Wesley Chu

CIPHER.1207.cipherString: We always assume that living, breathing, sensible creatures want peace.
CIPHER.1207.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Sheri S. Tepper, encrypted using a Porta Cipher using a keyword of DEARLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1207.author: Sheri S. Tepper

CIPHER.1208.cipherString: You are the ocean; everything else is just waves and wind.
CIPHER.1208.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Steve Maraboli encoded using a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of SALTS and polybius key of CIRCUMARCTIC. What does it say?
CIPHER.1208.author: Steve Maraboli

CIPHER.1209.cipherString: I must do something to keep my thoughts fresh and growing
CIPHER.1209.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Baconian puzzle by James A. Garfield. What does it say?
CIPHER.1209.author: James A. Garfield

CIPHER.1210.cipherString: Language alone protects us from the scariness of things with no names. Language alone is meditation.
CIPHER.1210.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Toni Morrison, written in a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.1210.author: Toni Morrison

CIPHER.1211.cipherString: I have the same goal I've had ever since I was a girl. I want to rule the world.
CIPHER.1211.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted quote by Madonna with a keyword length of 5. The 42nd through 51st cipher units (74 67 62 69 90 44 76 72 58 57) decode to be WANTTORULE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1211.author: Madonna

CIPHER.1212.cipherString: Photographers work best alone, myself included.
CIPHER.1212.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by Elliott Erwitt, encrypted with a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has LONE in it corresponding to the encoded text M G W N B Z, meaning B = ●×●; G = –●●; M = –×●; N = –×–; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1212.author: Elliott Erwitt

CIPHER.1213.cipherString: I'd always been a science fiction enthusiast.
CIPHER.1213.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Ivan Reitman encoded with a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text WRECK MEANT DEATH. SALTY decodes to be BEEN. does it say?
CIPHER.1213.author: Ivan Reitman

CIPHER.1214.cipherString: Soy bióloga marina, y el tema del uso excesivo de plástico me afecta mucho. Bueno, a mí no, a las especies marinas por las que cuido.
CIPHER.1214.question: This Spanish-language quote is about an issue that someone worries about at work. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.

CIPHER.1215.cipherString: I have lost both the oil and my paints.
CIPHER.1215.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Plautus, encoded as an Affine with a=9 and b=7. What does it say?
CIPHER.1215.author: Plautus

CIPHER.1216.cipherString: Peace of mind comes from not wanting to change others.
CIPHER.1216.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by Gerald Jampolsky encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.1216.author: Gerald Jampolsky

CIPHER.1217.cipherString: Siblings that say they never fight are most definitely hiding something.
CIPHER.1217.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Lemony Snicket, written in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of SATIRISTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1217.author: Lemony Snicket

CIPHER.1218.cipherString: A man may die, nations may rise and fall, but an idea lives on. Ideas have endurance without death.
CIPHER.1218.question: The following quote by John F. Kennedy needs to be decoded. It's an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1218.author: John F. Kennedy

CIPHER.1219.question: A message encrypted with the Cryptarithm Cipher has been received. What do the values 207406 05532839 decode to?

CIPHER.1220.cipherString: Cauliflower is nothing but cabbage with a college education.
CIPHER.1220.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Mark Twain, encoded using an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1220.author: Mark Twain

CIPHER.1221.cipherString: A wish is a desire without energy.
CIPHER.1221.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Affine encoded quote by Paramanhansa Yogananda. You are told that the cipher text IA decodes to be IS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1221.author: Paramanhansa Yogananda

CIPHER.1222.cipherString: Sometimes our light goes out, but is blown again into instant flame by an encounter with another human being.
CIPHER.1222.question: Scratched onto the lens of an abandoned telescope, decode this Caesar quote by Albert Schweitzer. What does it say?
CIPHER.1222.author: Albert Schweitzer

CIPHER.1223.cipherString: ¿Cómo te ha ido el verano hasta ahora? Yo estoy todavía en la playa pero me quedan solo dos días para volver a la ciudad.
CIPHER.1223.question: This quote in Spanish is from a letter that a girl has written to a friend. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.

CIPHER.1224.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 12823622360 729 decode to?

CIPHER.1225.cipherString: What is greatness? I will answer: it is the capacity to live by the three fundamental values of reason, purpose, and self-esteem.
CIPHER.1225.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Patristocrat Q&A by Ayn Rand using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains VALUE near the end of the second line, corresponding to the ciphertext letters TEDCA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1225.author: Ayn Rand

CIPHER.1226.cipherString: There was never a night or a problem that could defeat sunrise or hope.
CIPHER.1226.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Bernard Williams encoded with a Complete Columnar. The quote has THAT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1226.author: Bernard Williams

CIPHER.1227.cipherString: No poem is easily grasped so why should any reader expect fast results?
CIPHER.1227.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by John Barton, written as a Porta Cipher. The 9th through 14th cipher characters (ZRERQM) decode to be EASILY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1227.author: John Barton

CIPHER.1228.cipherString: Princes and Admirals, she thought, did not seem to be subject to the same rules as the rest of society.
CIPHER.1228.question: A quote by David D. Levine has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.1228.author: David D. Levine

CIPHER.1229.cipherString: How far you will go in life depends on how far you are willing to learn, plan and implement the good lessons you have learned.
CIPHER.1229.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote by Gift Gugu Mona about achievement, written using a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains LEARN in the middle of the second line, corresponding to the ciphertext letters ZVYWS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1229.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.1230.cipherString: The real city is the whole territory within which people move every day.
CIPHER.1230.question: A famous phrase by Constantinos Apostolou Doxiadis has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher. The 22nd through 30th cipher units (TT AU AC AC AO TT FC AC SU) decode to be TERRITORY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1230.author: Constantinos Apostolou Doxiadis

CIPHER.1231.cipherString: Nutritional supplements may give you false or inaccurate results on medical laboratory tests.
CIPHER.1231.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this K1 Aristocrat quote by Steven Magee. What does it say?
CIPHER.1231.author: Steven Magee

CIPHER.1232.cipherString: Public instruction should be the first object of government.
CIPHER.1232.question: Solve this Fractionated Morse by Napoleon. You are told that the quote has F GOVE in it corresponding to the encoded text N H Z F K Q Y A, meaning A = ●×●; F = –●×; H = ●–●; K = –––; N = –×●; Q = ×●●; Y = ●–×; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.1232.author: Napoleon

CIPHER.1233.cipherString: A few cobras in your home will soon clear it of rats and mice. Of course, you will still have the cobras.
CIPHER.1233.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Complete Columnar-encrypted message by Will Cuppy. The quote has WILL SOON somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1233.author: Will Cuppy
